name: @navarchus/cf-headers
description: Type-safe _headers file generator for Cloudflare Pages & Workers static assets, with a full catalog of HTTP response headers (status, deprecation, and reference info) and autocomplete for header names and values.

scripts.example:basic: bun run build && bunx vite build examples/basic && cat examples/basic/dist/_headers
scripts.example:production: bun run build && bunx vite build examples/production && cat examples/production/dist/_headers
scripts.example:vite: bun run example:basic && bun run example:production
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
